mapper.insert: INSERT INTO biz_tag (user_id, tag_name, audit_status, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{tagName}, #{auditStatus}, NOW())

INSERT INTO biz_tag (user_id, tag_name, audit_status, create_time) VALUES
(#{tag.userId}, #{tag.tagName}, #{tag.auditStatus}, NOW())
mapper.select:
SELECT id, user_id AS userId, tag_name AS tagName, audit_status AS auditStatus, create_time AS createTime FROM biz_tag
audit_status != 4
AND user_id = #{userId}
AND tag_name LIKE CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT id, user_id AS userId, tag_name AS tagName, audit_status AS auditStatus, create_time AS createTime FROM biz_tag WHERE audit_status != 4 AND id IN
#{id}

select id, user_id AS userId, tag_name AS tagName, audit_status AS auditStatus, create_time AS createTime from biz_tag where user_id = #{userId} and audit_status != 4 and tag_name in
#{tagName}

SELECT id, user_id AS userId, tag_name AS tagName, audit_status AS auditStatus, create_time AS createTime FROM biz_tag
audit_status != 4 AND
(user_id = #{userId} OR audit_status = 2)
user_id = #{userId}
AND tag_name LIKE CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY create_time DESC
